title: The Pink Stuff The Miracle Window & Glass Cleaner with Rose Vinegar 850ml
features: STREAK-FREE SHINE: The Pink Stuff Miracle Window & Glass Cleaner delivers a crystal-clear, streak-free finish, leaving your windows, mirrors, and glass surfaces sparkling clean.
POWERFUL ROSE VINEGAR FORMULA: Infused with natural rose vinegar, this cleaner effectively cuts through grease, dirt, and grime while leaving behind a fresh, pleasant scent.
MULTI-SURFACE GLASS CLEANER: Ideal for windows, mirrors, glass tables, shower doors, and more, ensuring versatile and efficient cleaning.
EASY-TO-USE SPRAY BOTTLE: Comes in a convenient 850ml spray bottle, making application quick, easy, and mess-free.
ECO-FRIENDLY & VEGAN FORMULA: Made with environmentally conscious ingredients, this cleaner is cruelty-free and safe for home use.
description: Product Description Achieve a sparkling clean, streak-free finish with The Pink Stuff Miracle Window & Glass Cleaner. Formulated with natural rose vinegar, this powerful yet gentle cleaner cuts through dirt, grease, and grime with ease while leaving behind a refreshing floral scent. Its versatile formula makes it perfect for windows, mirrors, shower doors, glass tables, and more. Designed for effortless application, the 850ml spray bottle ensures quick and mess-free cleaning. Plus, with its eco-friendly and cruelty-free ingredients, you can enjoy a shiny, spotless home while being kind to the environment.
